item.text:
Plan executed in order.

`df -h`:
The main system volume `/` is `926Gi` total, `12Gi` used, `289Gi` available. The data volume `/System/Volumes/Data` is `926Gi` total, `616Gi` used, `289Gi` available, at `69%` capacity.

`vm_stat`:
Page size is `16384` bytes. Free memory is `101867` pages, about `1.6 GiB`. There are `0` swapins and `0` swapouts currently, and only `610` pageouts, so there is no obvious sign of active memory pressure from swapping.

`/tmp` listing:
On this macOS system, `/tmp` is a symlink to `/private/tmp`, so I followed that target. Current entries include `claude-501/`, `com.apple.launchd.ahUguQVGAd/`, `com_pais_handy_si.sock`, `helmor-codex-edit-target.txt`, `helmor-fixture-test.txt`, `iNode/`, `openclaw/`, `powerlog/`, `verge/`, and `warp_docktile_2026-04-07_20-38-00.log`.

Summary:
Disk space looks healthy with about `289Gi` free. Memory currently has about `1.6 GiB` free and no active swapping. `/tmp` contains a small set of app/runtime temp directories, a socket, two `helmor` temp files, and one log file.
